meta-desc: Director of Operations at Tripearlsoft. A decade building brands, websites and apps that convert — from strategy to ship.
hero-lede: A decade leading creative and engineering teams to ship websites, brands and apps that earn attention — and pay it back in pipeline.
about-copy-1: I keep strategy, design and engineering moving in one direction —
about-copy-2: so every project finishes louder than it began.
about-body-1: I'm Maulik — Director of Operations at Tripearlsoft, a branding & digital studio in Ahmedabad. I work across websites, brand systems, mobile apps and digital marketing, usually with founders and small teams who need a partner that thinks in roadmaps and executes in pixels.
about-body-2: Three things I won't compromise on: relationships that outlast a single brief, process that respects your time, and numbers at the end of every quarter.
prac-lead: Most studios hand you off between specialists. I hold the whole line — so nothing gets lost in the gaps between them.
prac-1-sub: Landing pages to full commerce — WordPress, custom stacks, performance-first builds that load fast and rank.
prac-2-sub: Logos, systems, guidelines, packaging — the visual language a business runs on for years.
prac-3-sub: iOS, Android & cross-platform — React Native, Flutter, native Swift & Kotlin.
prac-4-sub: SEO, paid media, social & email — measurable channels with reporting that doesn't lie.
prac-5-sub: Scope, schedule, QA and handover — the unglamorous half of design that decides whether you ship.
proc-lead: No black box. Five stages — scroll to fly through them ✈
proc-1-desc: A first meeting is for diagnosis — not a pitch. We map goals, audience and constraints before anyone opens Figma.
proc-2-desc: One page: the story, the success metric, the non-negotiables. If the brief can't fit on a page, it isn't ready to start.
proc-3-desc: Design and engineering in parallel, with you in the room weekly. We share work-in-progress; we don't vanish into reveals.
proc-4-desc: QA across devices, performance audits, content checks — and a launch plan with paid & organic switched on the same week.
proc-5-desc: The first 90 days decide everything. We stay on, measure and iterate — turning a launch into a growth flywheel.
work-1-story: A vegetarian catering brand that needed far more than a menu page. We built a fully custom commerce platform — ordering & checkout, a live delivery view, an admin console and a kitchen check-in flow. Every panel bespoke, every state handled.
work-2-story: A material-handling leader entering India needed a site that looked the part. We took it from design to development — a high-end, well-versed presence engineered for credibility — then ran LinkedIn, Meta & X to fill the pipeline.
more-1-sub: Custom shopify store for chocolate and confectionery manufacturer
proof-1-lbl: Websites launched across India, the UK, US and Australia.
proof-3-lbl: Founders & teams served since the studio opened in 2016.
voice-lead: Drag the stack, or let it run.
voice-1-body: Maulik is a straight-talking, effective and hard-working multi-skilled director. He and Tripearlsoft provided all our needs in a timely fashion — with expertise that filled a skill gap we were missing.
voice-2-body: Maulik understood my needs in just a few messages. The results were beyond what I expected — good work, full stop.
voice-3-body: We redesigned twice in six months. The difference between the first agency and Maulik's team was significant — professional, original, an excellent communicator throughout.
voice-4-body: A leader interested not only in company growth but his team's — going above and beyond researching strategies to ensure clients succeed.
foot-4-body:
Mon — Fri, 10:00 — 19:00 IST
By appointment on weekends
